themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "Bede on Commentary on Genesis (Hexaemeron): And he called their names Adam on the day when th...". Word-study detail reinforces "בְּרֹ֤א: created - (absolutely) to create; (qualified) to cut down (a wood), select, feed (as...".
